---
title: "Fire & Recreation Intern"
description: "Applied GIS to support spatial planning and risk assessment for land management projects."
org: "Student Conservation Association / US Forest Service"
org-url: "https://thesca.org/integrated-fire-and-recreation-internship-program"
date: "2023-01-01"
dates: "Jan 2023 – May 2023"
location: "Wise, VA"
categories: [Experience]
---

::: {.nw-detail-lead}
<a class="nw-tl-org" href="https://thesca.org/integrated-fire-and-recreation-internship-program" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Student Conservation Association / US Forest Service</a> · Jan 2023 – May 2023 · Wise, VA
:::

Through the Student Conservation Association's Integrated Fire and Recreation program, I worked with the US Forest Service applying GIS to land management on the Jefferson National Forest.

- Applied GIS to spatial planning and risk assessment for land management projects.
- Supported fire and recreation operations in the field.
- Produced maps and spatial data products for management decisions.
